title: Hero MotoCorp is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hero MotoCorp is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Hero MotoCorp in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hero MotoCorp:
Hero MotoCorp is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hero MotoCorp!
